offline.banner: You're offline — showing cached / mock data.

auth.checkEmail: Check your inbox to confirm your account.
auth.resetSent: If that account exists, a reset email has been sent.
auth.passwordUpdated: Password updated. You can log in now.
auth.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.guestNotice: Supabase isn't configured — you're in guest mode (local data). Add your keys to enable accounts.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: What's hot right now — from Google Trends + Reddit, scored automatically.

metrics.asin: ASIN — Amazon Standard Identification Number. The unique 10-character ID Amazon gives every product.
metrics.price: The current listed selling price of the product.
metrics.bsr: BSR — Best Sellers Rank. How well a product sells inside its category. #1 = the best seller. Lower number = more sales.
metrics.sales: Estimated units sold per month. Calculated from the BSR using a category sales curve (an estimate, not exact Amazon data).
metrics.revenue: Estimated gross revenue per month = estimated monthly sales × price (before fees).
metrics.reviews: Total number of customer reviews. Lots of reviews = an established, harder-to-beat competitor.
metrics.rating: Average star rating out of 5. A low rating with high sales can be an opportunity to make a better product.
metrics.sellers: How many sellers offer this exact product. More sellers = more price competition on the same listing.
metrics.fba: FBA fee — what Amazon charges to store, pack and ship one unit (Fulfilled By Amazon), plus the ~15% referral fee. Subtract it from price to gauge margin.
metrics.niche: Niche Score (0–100) — our quick read on how attractive this set of products is to enter. Higher = easier + more profitable. Blends competition (reviews), profitability (revenue) and price sweet-spot.
metrics.volume: Search Volume — roughly how many times per month people type this keyword into search.
metrics.competition: Competition — how many advertisers/sellers fight over this keyword. Low = easier to rank/advertise.
metrics.cpc: CPC — Cost Per Click. The estimated price advertisers pay for one click. High CPC = buyers with money.
metrics.trend: Trend — whether interest in this keyword is rising or falling over recent months.

search.title: Product Search & Analysis
search.subtitle: Search Amazon by keyword and get sales, revenue and competition estimates.
search.emptyHint: Type a product keyword above to analyze a niche.

keywords.title: Keyword Research
keywords.subtitle: Enter a seed keyword to discover related terms, demand and ad cost.
keywords.emptyHint: Enter a seed keyword to pull related terms with volume, CPC and competition.

competitors.title: Competitor Analysis
competitors.subtitle: Enter an ASIN to pull its top 10 competing products and compare them.
competitors.placeholder: e.g. B0XXXXXXXX (any ASIN works in mock mode)
competitors.emptyHint: Paste an ASIN to see who you'd be up against and how strong they are.
competitors.clickRow: Click any row to open full details.

trends.title: Google Trends
trends.subtitle: Rising & declining shopping niches. Refreshes every 24h.
trends.note: Per-category momentum is modeled (the public Trends RSS only exposes the daily search list). Daily searches are live when Google responds.
trends.rangeHint: Search-interest index (0–100) for the fastest-rising niches.

bestsellers.title: Amazon Best Sellers
bestsellers.subtitle: Top ranked products on amazon.fr by category. Sales estimated from rank.
bestsellers.mockNote: Showing realistic mock data — Amazon blocked the live scrape (common from datacenter IPs). Try refresh.

saved.title: Saved Products
saved.subtitleLocal: Your shortlist, stored locally in this browser.
saved.subtitleSync: Your shortlist, synced to your account.
saved.emptyHint: Hit “Save” on any product to build your shortlist.

kanban.title: Research Board
kanban.subtitleLocal: Drag niches across stages. Saved locally.
kanban.subtitleSync: Drag niches across stages. Synced to your account.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: A local, private assistant (Ollama) for factual FBA questions — definitions and metric explanations only.
assistant.enableIntro: The assistant works fully offline on your machine. To enable it:
assistant.untilThen: Until then, use the built-in glossary on the right.
assistant.errStopped: Ollama stopped responding. Is it still running?
assistant.errGeneric: The assistant could not answer. Try again.

errors.network: Network/CORS error — the API blocked the browser request. Mock mode avoids this.
errors.auth: Authentication failed — check your API key in .env.
errors.rate: Rate limit reached — the free API tier is exhausted. Try again later or use mock mode.
errors.emailInUse: This email is already in use.

profile.title: My profile
profile.guestNotice: Configure Supabase and log in to manage your profile.
profile.uploadFail: Upload failed (create a public 'avatars' bucket in Supabase Storage).
profile.logoutAllDesc: End all your active sessions everywhere.
profile.deleteWarn: Irreversible: your account and all data will be deleted.

cookies.banner: We use local storage to run the site (language, session). No ads, no trackers.
